stage1.prompt: 选出 battery 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 电池（复数 batteries）。run out of batteries 电池用完了。
learn.example: The remote control needs new batteries.

stage1.prompt: 选出 air conditioner 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 空调机；空调设备（air 空气 + conditioner 调节器）。注意缩略词 AC。
learn.example: Turn on the air conditioner. It's too hot.

stage1.prompt: 选出 electricity 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 电；电能（不可数）。形容词 electric（用电的），electrical（与电有关的）。注意区分：electric car 电动汽车，electrical appliance 电器。
learn.example: The fridge uses a lot of electricity.

stage1.prompt: 选出 tablet 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 平板电脑。也可指'药片'。tablet computer 平板电脑。注意不要和 table（桌子）混淆。
learn.example: She uses a tablet to read e-books.

stage1.prompt: 选出 yogurt 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 酸奶（不可数）。美式拼写 yogurt，英式也可拼作 yoghurt。
learn.example: The yogurt in the fridge has gone bad.

stage1.prompt: 选出 switch-off 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 关闭（电灯、机器等）的（= turned off）。switch on 打开，switch off 关掉。
learn.example: Make sure all switch-off devices before leaving.

options: A television set uses more electricity than a light bulb.
Both A and B are correct.
A television set uses more electricity than a light bulb does.
A television set use more electricity than a light bulb.

learn.meaning: gram. than 后面可以省略助动词（does），也可以保留，两者都对。D 错在主语 A television set 单数 + uses（不是 use）。
learn.example: It uses more than a light bulb (does).

stage1.prompt: 选出 television set 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 电视机（= TV set。set 指'一台机器'）。注意 television 指'电视'这种媒介，television set 指具体的机器。
learn.example: They bought a new television set.

stage1.prompt: 选出 fridge 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 冰箱（refrigerator 的缩写）。注意拼写：fridge 里有 d，refrigerator 里没有 d。
learn.example: Put the yogurt in the fridge, or it will go bad.

stage1.prompt: 选出 light bulb 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 电灯泡（light 光 + bulb 球状物）。注意拼写：bulb 不是 blub。
learn.example: The light bulb needs to be changed.

stage1.prompt: 选出 electric 和 electrical 的区别
stage1.q: We bought an ___ car and some ___ appliances.

learn.meaning: adj. electric 指'靠电驱动的'（electric car 电动汽车）；electrical 指'与电相关的'（electrical appliance 电器）。
learn.example: an electric car, an electrical engineer

stage1.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查电器词汇）
stage1.q: 冰箱里的酸奶变质了，因为停电时电器都被关掉了。
options: The yogurts in the fridge went bad because all electrical appliance were switched off during the power cut.
The yogurt in the fridge went bad because all electric appliances were switch-off during the power cut.
The yogurt in the fridge went badly because all electrical appliances were switched off during the power cut.
The yogurt in the fridge went bad because all electrical appliances were switched off during the power cut.

learn.word: electrical appliances / switched off / go bad
learn.meaning: gram. ①electrical appliances（电器）②switched off（被动语态）③go bad 变质（不用 badly）④yogurt 不可数。
learn.example: The yogurt went bad because the fridge was off.

stage2.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查不可数名词）
stage2.q: 我们家的冰箱老是没电，里面的酸奶经常变质。
options: The fridge in our household always runs out of electricity, and the yogurt inside often goes badly.
The fridge in our household always runs out electricity, and the yogurt inside often goes bad.
The fridge in our household always runs out of electricity, and the yogurt inside often goes bad.
The fridge in our household always run out of electricity, and the yogurt inside often go bad.

learn.word: run out of / go bad / 主谓一致
learn.meaning: gram. ①run out of + 宾语（of 不可省）②go bad（不用 badly）③主语 The fridge 单数 + runs；yogurt 不可数 + goes。
learn.example: The fridge runs out of power. The yogurt goes bad.

stage2.prompt: 选出 for a while 的正确用法

learn.meaning: phr. 一会儿（固定搭配，a 不可省）。不说 for while 或 for the while。
learn.example: Wait for a while. (NOT: Wait for while.)

stage2.q: 关掉空调一会儿能省电，这是我们家的日常任务。
options: Switching off the air conditioner for while saves electricity. It's our daily household task.
Switch off the air conditioner for a while save electricity. It's our daily household task.
Switching off the air conditioner for a while saves electricity. It's our daily household tasks.
Switching off the air conditioner for a while saves electricity. It's our daily household task.

learn.word: Switching off... saves / for a while
learn.meaning: gram. ①动名词短语 Switching off... 作主语，谓语用单数 saves ②for a while（a 不可省）③task 单数（指一件事）。
learn.example: Switching off the AC saves electricity.

stage2.prompt: 选出 video game 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 电子游戏（video 视频 + game 游戏）。play video games 用复数。
learn.example: He spends too much time on video games.

stage2.prompt: 选出 run out of 和 run out 的区别
stage2.q: The fridge ___ power. The battery finally ___.
options: run out of / ran out of

learn.word: run out of + 宾语 / run out（无宾语）
learn.meaning: gram. run out of + 宾语（用完某物）。run out 不及物，主语是物（某物用完了）。
learn.example: We ran out of water. / The water ran out.

stage2.prompt: 选出 while 的介词搭配
stage2.q: I played video games ___ a while, then did my ___.

learn.meaning: phr. for a while 固定搭配（介词用 for）；task 是可数名词。
learn.example: I read for a while, then did my task.

stage2.prompt: 选出 apartment 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 公寓套房（美式）。英式用 flat。apartment building 公寓楼。
learn.example: They live in a small apartment.

stage2.prompt: 选出 household 的中文意思

learn.meaning: adj. 家庭的（household appliance 家用电器）。名词 household 可指'全家人'。
learn.example: The fridge is a common household appliance.

stage2.prompt: 选出 task 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 任务；活动（household tasks 家务）。注意 task 和 homework 区别：task 泛指任何任务，homework 专指家庭作业。
learn.example: My daily task is to take out the rubbish.

stage2.prompt: 选出 while 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 一段时间；一会儿（for a while 一会儿）。也可作连词'当……时'。
learn.example: Wait for a while. The battery is charging.

stage2.prompt: 选出 go bad 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 变质（go + 形容词，表示'变得……'）。go bad 专指食物变质。不说 become bad。
learn.example: The milk will go bad if you don't put it in the fridge.

stage2.prompt: 选出 run out of 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 用完；耗尽（+ 宾语）。run out 用完了（无宾语）。We ran out of batteries. = The batteries ran out.
learn.example: We ran out of electricity. = The electricity ran out.

stage3.prompt: 选出 rule 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 规则；条例（safety rules 安全规则）。也可作动词'统治'。
learn.example: Follow the safety rules at all times.

stage3.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（检查 connect 和 against）
stage3.q: 根据安全说明，不要把电器靠着墙放置，要先连接好电源。
options: According to the safety instructions, don't put electrical appliances against the wall. Connect them for the power first.
According to the safety instruction, don't put electrical appliances against the wall. Connect them with the power first.
According to the safety instructions, don't put electric appliances against the wall. Connect them to the power first.
According to the safety instructions, don't put electrical appliances against the wall. Connect them to the power first.

learn.meaning: gram. ①instructions 复数 ②electrical appliances ③connect...to（不是 with/for）④against the wall 紧靠墙。
learn.example: Don't put appliances against the wall. Connect them to power.

stage3.prompt: 选出 connect 的正确介词搭配
stage3.q: Connect the tablet ___ the Wi-Fi first.

learn.meaning: phr. 把 A 连接到 B（connect...to...）。connect with 指'与……联系/沟通'（connect with friends）。
learn.example: Connect the phone to the charger. / I connect with friends online.

stage3.prompt: 选出 against 的语境理解
stage3.q: He leaned the tablet ___ the wall while charging.

learn.meaning: prep. lean...against 把……靠在……上。against 在这里是'紧靠着'的意思，不是'反对'。
learn.example: He leaned the bike against the tree.

stage3.prompt: 选出 device 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 装置；设备（smart device 智能设备）。注意拼写：device 是名词，devise 是动词'设计'。
learn.example: Smartphones are common devices today.

stage3.prompt: 选出 instruction 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 用法说明；操作指南（常用复数 instructions。follow the instructions 按照说明操作）。
learn.example: Read the instructions before using the device.

stage3.prompt: 选出 connect 的中文意思

learn.meaning: v.（使）连接。connect A to B 把 A 连接到 B。反义 disconnect 断开。
learn.example: Connect the battery to the device.

stage3.prompt: 选出 safety 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 安全；平安（safe adj. → safety n.）。safety rules 安全规则。
learn.example: Your safety is the most important thing.

stage3.prompt: 选出 electrical appliance 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 电器（electrical 与电相关的 + appliance 器具）。注意 electrical 不是 electric。
learn.example: The fridge is a common electrical appliance.

stage3.q: The safety ___ are on the back of the box.

learn.meaning: gram. 表示'操作指南'时，instruction 通常用复数 instructions。谓语 are 说明主语是复数。
learn.example: The instructions are easy to follow.

stage3.prompt: 选出 against 的中文意思

learn.meaning: prep. 紧靠；碰；撞（lean against the wall 靠在墙上）。也可指'反对'。本单元取'紧靠'义。
learn.example: Don't put the fridge against the wall.

stage3.q: 确保遵守安全规则，在连接设备前阅读说明。
options: Make sure you follow the safety rules and read the instructions before connecting the device.
Make sure to follow the safety rules and read the instruction before connecting the device.
Make sure to follow the safety rules and read the instructions before connecting the device to.
Make sure to follow the safety rules and read the instructions before connecting the device.

learn.word: make sure + 从句 / make sure to do
learn.meaning: gram. make sure 后可接 to do 或 (that) 从句，两者都对。选项 A 和 D 都正确，D 用从句更口语化。
learn.example: Make sure to read them. = Make sure (that) you read them.

stage4.prompt: 选出 speed 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 速度；速率（at high speed 高速）。electric car 的 speed 是其重要参数。
learn.example: The electric car can reach a high speed.

stage4.prompt: 选出 landmark 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 地标（land 土地 + mark 标记）。也可指'里程碑'（喻义）。
learn.example: The Eiffel Tower is a famous landmark.

stage4.prompt: 选出 climate 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 气候（长期天气模式）。weather 指短期天气，climate 指长期气候。climate change 气候变化。
learn.example: Climate change affects everyone.

stage4.prompt: 选出 care about 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 关注；担忧（care about + 名词/V-ing）。care for 照顾，care about 关注/在乎。
learn.example: We should care about climate change.

stage4.prompt: 选出 join in 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 参加；加入（join in + 活动）。join + 组织（不加 in）。join in the game，但 join the club。
learn.example: Come and join in the game! / She joined the team.

stage4.prompt: 选出 electric car 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 电动汽车（electric 靠电驱动的 + car）。注意 electric 不是 electrical。electric car = EV。
learn.example: Electric cars are becoming more popular.

stage4.prompt: 选出 amount 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 数量；数额（an amount of + 不可数名词）。number 用于可数名词。
learn.example: A large amount of electricity is wasted every day.

stage4.prompt: 选出 climate change 的中文意思

learn.meaning: n. 气候变化（climate 气候 + change 变化）。不同于 global warming（全球变暖），范围更广。
learn.example: Climate change is a global problem.

stage4.prompt: 选出 join in 和 join 的区别
stage4.q: Would you like to ___ the club or just ___ today's activity?

learn.word: join + 组织 / join in + 活动
learn.meaning: gram. join + 组织（成为成员）。join in + 活动（参与活动，不是正式成员）。
learn.example: He joined the team. / He joined in the game.

stage4.q: 电动汽车的速度很快，而且不会消耗大量电能，所以人们越来越关注它们。
options: Electric cars have high speed and don't use a large number of electricity, so people care about them more and more.
Electric cars have high speed and don't use a large amount of electricity, so people care about them more and more.
Electric cars has high speed and don't use a large amount of electricity, so people care about them more and more.
Electric cars have high speed and don't use a large amount electricity, so people care about them more and more.

learn.word: amount of + 不可数 / have + 复数主语
learn.meaning: gram. ①a large amount of electricity（amount 后接 of，不可省）②主语 cars 复数 + have（不是 has）③amount 不换 number。
learn.example: Electric cars have high speed and use little electricity.

stage4.prompt: 选出 amount 的正确搭配

learn.word: amount of + 不可数 / 谓语单数
learn.meaning: gram. electricity 不可数 → amount（不是 number）。a large amount of + 不可数名词，谓语用单数 is。
learn.example: A large amount of water is wasted. (NOT: number of water)

stage4.prompt: 选出 power 作动词的中文意思

learn.meaning: v. 驱动；推动（机器或车辆）。The car is powered by electricity. 名词 power 也可指'电力、力量'。
learn.example: The device is powered by solar energy.

stage5.prompt: 选出 climate 和 weather 的区别
stage5.q: Today's ___ is sunny, but the ___ here is usually wet.

learn.meaning: weather 短期天气，climate 长期气候。今天 sunny 是 weather，通常 wet 是 climate。
learn.example: The weather is nice today. The climate here is warm.

stage5.prompt: 选出最佳翻译（综合陷阱）
stage5.q: 这些电器有一个共同点：它们都靠电能驱动，而且我们都应该关心它们的能耗。
options: These electrical appliances has something in common: they are all powered by electricity, and we should all care about how much they use.
These electrical appliances have something in common: they all powered by electricity, and we should all care about how much they use.
These electrical appliances have something in common: they are all powered by electricity, and we should all care about how much they use.
These electrical appliances have something in common: they are all powered by electricity, and we should all care for how much they use.

learn.word: have in common / are powered / care about
learn.meaning: gram. ①appliances 复数 + have ②are powered（被动语态，be 不可省）③care about 关注（不是 care for 照顾）。
learn.example: They have something in common: they are all powered by electricity.

stage5.q: 关于 have...in common 和 amount
options: All electrical devices has one thing in common: a large amount of electricity are needed to power them.
All electrical devices have one thing in common: a large amount of electricity is needed to power them.
All electrical devices have one thing in common: a large amount of electricity are needed to power them.
All electrical devices have one thing in commonly: a large amount of electricity is needed to power them.

learn.word: have in common / amount + 不可数 + is
learn.meaning: gram. ①devices 复数 + have ②in common（不是 commonly）③a large amount of electricity 不可数 + is。
learn.example: They have one thing in common: a large amount of energy is needed.

stage5.prompt: 选出 have...in common 的中文意思

learn.meaning: phr. 有相同的特征（或特点等）。have a lot/nothing in common 有很多/没有共同点。
learn.example: The two devices have a lot in common.

stage5.q: 空调和冰箱都是家用电器，但它们的耗电量差别很大。
options: Air conditioners and fridges are both household appliances, but the amount of electricity they use is very different.
Air conditioners and fridges are both household appliances, but the number of electricity they use is very different.
Air conditioners and fridges is both household appliances, but the amount of electricity they use is very different.
Air conditioner and fridge are both household appliance, but the amount of electricity they use is very different.

learn.word: both + 复数 / amount of + 不可数
learn.meaning: gram. ①Air conditioners and fridges 复数 + are ②electricity 不可数 → amount（不是 number）③appliances 复数。
learn.example: They are both household appliances, but the amount of electricity they use differs.

stage5.q: 你应该加入我们的节能行动——每关一盏灯，都在为地球省电。
options: You should join in our energy-saving campaign — every light bulb switched off saves electricity for the planet.
You should join our energy-saving campaign — every light bulb switched off saves electricity for the planet.
Both A and B are correct.
You should join in our energy-saving campaign — every light bulb switch-off saves electricity for the planet.

learn.word: join / join in 都可用于活动
learn.meaning: gram. campaign 是活动，join 和 join in 都可以。两者在口语中常互换使用。C 错在 switch-off 是形容词。
learn.example: You can join (in) the campaign.

stage5.prompt: 选出 go bad 和 run out 的综合应用
stage5.q: If the fridge ___ of power, the food inside will ___.

learn.meaning: gram. ①主语 the fridge 单数 + runs out ②the food 不可数 + will + 动词原形 go bad（不是 goes，因在 will 后）。
learn.example: If the fridge runs out of power, the food will go bad.

stage5.prompt: 选出 landmark 的正确语境
stage5.q: The Great Wall is a world-famous ___ and attracts millions of tourists.

learn.meaning: n. 地标，是一个词 landmark（不是 land mark 或 land's mark）。
learn.example: The tower is a famous landmark.

stage5.prompt: 选出 amount of 和 number of 的区别
stage5.q: The ___ of electric cars on the road has increased. A large ___ of energy is saved.

learn.word: number + 可数 / amount + 不可数
learn.meaning: gram. cars 可数 → number of cars。energy 不可数 → amount of energy。两者不能互换。
learn.example: The number of cars / A large amount of energy

stage5.prompt: 选出 power 作动词的被动语态
stage5.q: The device ___ by a small battery.

learn.meaning: gram. 被动语态 be powered by + 能源。The device is powered by electricity. 不说 The device powers by...
learn.example: The car is powered by electricity. (NOT: powers by)

stage5.prompt: 选出 instruction 和 information 的区别
stage5.q: Follow the ___ carefully. They give important ___ about safety.

learn.meaning: instructions 复数（说明），information 不可数（信息）。不说 informations。
learn.example: Read the instructions. / The information is useful.

stage5.prompt: 选出 have...in common 的主谓一致
stage5.q: The fridge and the air conditioner ___ something ___.

learn.meaning: gram. 主语 The fridge and the air conditioner（两个事物）→ 复数 have。in common 固定搭配，common 前有 in。
learn.example: They have something in common.
